item.title: The First Seed: Why I'm Starting This Digital Garden
item.description:
In the name of God

Welcome to my little garden! My corner of the web.

For a long time, I’ve wanted a space to document and share my journey—not just the finished products, but the messy, exciting process of learning and building.

What to expect here:

This space is designed as a Digital Garden—a living collection of notes, essays, and experiments that will grow and evolve over time. Here is what I plan (and not plan!) to share:

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
Welcome to my digital garden.

This is where I’ll be sharing my explorations, learnings, and thoughts. Stay tuned!

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Ali Choopan

Software Engineer & AI Specialist
Tehran, Iran • LinkedIn • choopan [at] gmail [dot] com

Profile

I have a technical background in software engineering and AI—both from Sharif University and from years of hands-on work. I like building things: products, tools, and teams. Recently, I’ve been refocusing on AI and hands-on technical work, with a particular interest in building useful, responsible AI tools for everyday life and professional work.
